content:
<!-- type: schema lang: json -->

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "title": "Workspace Protocol — New and Extended Schemas",
  "$defs": {
    "PnpmWorkspaceYaml": {
      "$id": "jet://schemas/pnpm-workspace-yaml",
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Structure of pnpm-workspace.yaml parsed by load_config()",
      "properties": {
        "packages": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": { "type": "string" },
          "description": "Glob patterns selecting workspace package dirs (e.g. ['packages/*', 'apps/*'])"
        },
        "catalog": {
          "type": "object",
          "description": "Default catalog: dep_name → version_range",
          "additionalProperties": { "type": "string" }
        },
        "catalogs": {
          "type": "object",
          "description": "Named catalogs: catalog_name → { dep_name → version_range }. Flattened into WorkspaceConfig.catalog with key prefix 'catalog_name:'",
          "additionalProperties": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": { "type": "string" }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "LockfileEntryWorkspace": {
      "$id": "jet://schemas/lockfile-entry-workspace",
      "description": "Extension of LockfileEntry for workspace-protocol packages",
      "allOf": [{ "$ref": "jet://schemas/lockfile-entry" }],
      "properties": {
        "workspace": {
          "type": "boolean",
          "default": false,
          "description": "True if this entry is a workspace package installed via symlink, not store extraction. Skips store.has_package() check in is_valid()."
        },
        "localPath": {
          "type": ["string", "null"],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Relative path from lockfile root to workspace package directory (e.g. 'packages/ui'). Serialized as 'localPath' in jet-lock.yaml."
        }
      }
    },
    "ResolvedPackageWorkspace": {
      "$id": "jet://schemas/resolved-package-workspace",
      "description": "Extension of ResolvedPackage carrying workspace metadata through the resolve→lockfile pipeline",
      "allOf": [{ "$ref": "jet://schemas/resolved-package" }],
      "properties": {
        "workspace": {
          "type": "boolean",
          "default": false,
          "description": "True when this resolved package is a workspace dep (no tarball download)"
        },
        "local_path": {
          "type": ["string", "null"],
          "default": null,
          "description": "Relative path from workspace root to this package's directory, set when workspace=true"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
